cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out step by step. So we have five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each of them starts with a partner. Let me jot down the initial pairings: - Alice with Helga - Bob with Jamie - Claire with Ophelia - Dave with Karl - Eve with Rodrigo Then there are a series of partner swaps. I need to track each swap and see who ends up with whom at the end. Let me go through each step one by one. First swap: Eve and Bob switch partners. So Eve was with Rodrigo, and Bob was with Jamie. After swapping, Eve would be with Jamie and Bob would be with Rodrigo. Let me update that: After first swap: - Alice: Helga - Bob: Rodrigo - Claire: Ophelia - Dave: Karl - Eve: Jamie Second swap: Dave and Claire switch partners. Dave was with Karl, Claire was with Ophelia. After swapping, Dave is with Ophelia and Claire is with Karl. Updating: After second swap: - Alice: Helga - Bob: Rodrigo - Claire: Karl - Dave: Ophelia - Eve: Jamie Third swap: Claire and Bob switch partners. Claire was with
